  • Uses of HistoryManager in com.dlsc.gemsfx.util

    Subclasses of HistoryManager in com.dlsc.gemsfx.util
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    InMemoryHistoryManager<T>
    A simple history manager that does not persist its items anywhere.
    class 
    PreferencesHistoryManager<T>
    Manages a history of items of type T, storing them in a Java Preferences backend.
    class 
    StringHistoryManager
    Manages a history of string records using the Java Preferences API.
